hero.title: Private Real Estate
hero.subtitle: Exclusive access to the most prestigious off-market properties on the Côte d'Azur.

collection.title: Curated Private Collection
collection.desc: Our portfolio consists of the most prestigious properties, many of which are exclusively managed by our agency and not listed on the public market. We provide a discreet gateway to the world's most sought-after coastal estates.
collection.card1Desc: Access to off-market gems for the most discerning international buyers.
collection.card2Desc: Bespoke services ensuring a seamless transition to your new Mediterranean life.

featured.title: Featured Properties

inquiry.title: Private Inquiry
inquiry.desc: Connect with our specialists for a private consultation or to receive details on our off-market portfolio.

hero.title: Legal & Tax Advisory for Property Acquisition in France
hero.subtitle: Expert guidance for high-net-worth individuals acquiring premium real estate on the French Riviera, ensuring security and fiscal efficiency.

services.title: Services Overview
services.desc: We provide a comprehensive legal and fiscal framework tailored to international investors, managing every nuance of the French property law system.
services.item1Desc: A rigorous audit of property titles, urban planning certificates, and environmental assessments to guarantee your peace of mind.
services.item2Desc: Strategic establishment of 'Société Civile Immobilière' entities to optimize ownership structures for management and inheritance.

ownership.title: Structured Ownership
ownership.subtitle: Sophisticated solutions for long-term asset preservation.
ownership.card1Desc: Bespoke debt-structuring strategies to legally minimize exposure to the French Real Estate Wealth Tax.
ownership.card2Desc: Protecting your legacy through cross-border inheritance optimization and gift planning mechanisms.
ownership.card3Desc: Isolating property assets from personal liability through secure legal frameworks and specialized holdings.

form.title: Request a Confidential Consultation
form.subtitle: Our senior partners are available for a private briefing on your acquisition project.
form.messagePlaceholder: How can our legal team assist you?
form.gdpr: All inquiries are handled with the strictest confidentiality in accordance with GDPR.

collection.title: The French Riviera Collection
collection.desc: If you haven't found your perfect property in our public collection, please contact us. Many of our most exclusive estates are strictly off-market.
